Metadata.title: 55mas - Experienced professionals
Metadata.description: Professional services marketplace for people over 55

Common.notFoundDescription: The page you are looking for does not exist
Common.emailChangeDefaultBody: A confirmation link will be sent to the new email. The change takes effect once you confirm it from your inbox.

AdminServices.title: Services
AdminServices.name: Name
AdminServices.question: Question
AdminServices.deleteServiceDescription: This will permanently delete "{name}" and all its data: translations, country/city configuration, forms, and required documents. This action cannot be undone.

AdminSurveyQuestions.title: Survey Questions
AdminSurveyQuestions.description: Define survey questions to collect data from talents (e.g., How did you find us?, rate 1 to 5).

AdminSubtypes.title: Subtypes
AdminSubtypes.description: Manage reusable subtype groups. Then assign them to individual services.
AdminSubtypes.assignDescription: Select which subtype groups apply to this service.
AdminSubtypes.noGroupsAvailable: No groups created. Create groups in the Subtypes section.

AdminFormDefinitions.title: Forms
AdminFormDefinitions.description: Manage the static marketplace forms: country activation and i18n.
AdminFormDefinitions.schemaReadOnlyHint: The schema (fields and types) is read-only from admin. It is only edited in code.
AdminFormDefinitions.globalActiveHelp: If disabled, the form is not loaded on the front even if it has assigned countries.
AdminFormDefinitions.activeCountriesHelp: Select the countries where the form should be available. Activation is per full country (all cities).
AdminFormDefinitions.noCountries: No active countries in the system.
AdminFormDefinitions.noFields: This form has no fields in the schema.

AdminFiscalIdTypes.title: Fiscal ID types
AdminFiscalIdTypes.description: Manage fiscal ID types available per country (NIF, NIE, CUIT, etc.). Deactivating preserves historical records.

AdminTalentTags.title: Talent tags
AdminTalentTags.description: Manage the tags backoffice applies to talents. Deactivating keeps historical assignments.
AdminTalentTags.confirmDelete: Deactivate this tag? Existing assignments will be preserved.

AdminServiceQuestions.description: Define the questions the client must answer when hiring this service. Answers are stored in each order.
AdminServiceQuestions.noQuestions: This service has no questions yet. Add the first one.
AdminServiceQuestions.label: Label
AdminServiceQuestions.manualOptionsHint: Define options manually with their translation per locale.
AdminServiceQuestions.subtypeIncludeHint: Tick the sub-types that will be shown to the client. All included by default.
AdminServiceQuestions.noGroupsAssigned: This service has no sub-type groups assigned. Configure them in the Sub-types tab first.

AdminSpokenLanguages.title: Spoken languages
AdminSpokenLanguages.description: Manage the catalog of languages spoken by talents and clients. ISO codes are immutable once created.
AdminSpokenLanguages.codeHint: Lowercase, 2–3 letters. E.g.: pt, en, yue.
AdminSpokenLanguages.codeReadonlyHint: The ISO code cannot be changed. To rename, create a new language.
AdminSpokenLanguages.confirmDelete: Deactivate this language? It will be hidden from dropdowns, but existing profiles with this code are preserved.

errors.duplicateCode: A language with that code already exists.
errors.saveFailed: Could not save. Please try again.
errors.invalidCode: The code must be lowercase and 2–3 letters (e.g.: pt, en, yue).
errors.missingTranslation: Missing translations in one or more languages.

TalentPortal.noForm: No form available for this service.

AdminMembers.title: Team members
AdminMembers.memberCreated: Member created. Invitation sent by email.

AdminMigration.title: Data migration
AdminMigration.dropFile: Drag a CSV file or click to select
AdminMigration.csvLanguage: What language is the CSV in?

TalentRegistration.title: Talent registration — 55+
TalentRegistration.description: Join the 55+ network as a professional talent.
TalentRegistration.heading: Talent registration
TalentRegistration.intro: Complete your details to start offering services.
TalentRegistration.onboardingPlaceholderBody: Soon you will be able to complete the information for each service you offer.
TalentRegistration.locationNotDetected: Start by typing your address above to detect country and city automatically.
TalentRegistration.cityManualHint: We could not auto-detect your city. Please select it from the list.
